fit_reason: Pure e-commerce brand focused on accessible design furniture. Strong Instagram presence, premium product photography, price range R$800-R$5.000+. Perfect AR candidate — online-only means they need tools to reduce buyer hesitation.
notes: Digital-native brand. Plans for Black Friday 2025. 238k IG followers with 0.43% engagement.

fit_reason: 633K Instagram followers — massive audience. Premium customizable furniture with designer collections. Has online outlet store. High-ticket items ideal for AR visualization.
notes: Largest Instagram following in the list. Offers planned furniture and customization. Based in MG.

fit_reason: Launching 2025-2026 collections including poltronas. Design-focused brand combining engineering and aesthetics. Growing brand perfect for early AR adoption.
notes: Has lançamentos for 2025/2026. Design + engineering focus aligns well with 3D visualization pitch.

fit_reason: Major sofa and mattress e-commerce player. Premium artisanal finishes. High consumer indecision in this category makes AR a strong sell.
notes: Specializes in sofás and colchões. Artisanal premium positioning.

fit_reason: High-end customizable luxury furniture. Works with architects and designers nationwide. Premium price points (R$3.000+) make AR visualization extremely valuable for reducing return friction.
notes: Ships across Brazil. Personalized/custom-made luxury furniture. Architect-focused.

fit_reason: Premium outdoor furniture with artisanal focus. International presence (Miami). AR would be game-changing for outdoor furniture — clients can visualize pieces in their actual outdoor spaces.
notes: Not a direct e-commerce — appointment-based. International market. Very premium brand.

fit_reason: Market leader brand in Brazil. Wide range of furniture. Strong online presence. Could benefit from AR to differentiate from MadeiraMadeira/Mobly commodity positioning.
notes: Described as 'marca líder de mercado'. Broad catalog.

fit_reason: Sophisticated and exclusive furniture. Decompression/relaxation focused products. Premium positioning where AR helps justify higher price points.
notes: Sofás and poltronas with exclusivity focus.

fit_reason: 100% Brazilian autoral design brand. 14 curated designers. Won Building of the Year 2025 award. Premium and artisanal — AR aligns with their innovation positioning.
notes: Award-winning brand. Curated by Clarissa Schneider. May be more B2B/showroom oriented.

fit_reason: Exclusive handcrafted furniture by renowned designers. Describes pieces as 'true works of art'. AR could help showcase the artisanal quality to online buyers hesitating on premium purchases.
notes: Events and launches planned for 2025. Very premium/artisanal positioning.
